title: 8 Disciplines That Prove a Godly Man Runs His Life
caption:
A godly man isn't run by his impulses, his notifications, or the version of him that shows up after the third drink.

He answers his phone on his schedule. Finishes what he said he'd finish. Says no before he has to. Goes to bed on time. Tells the truth when a lie would've been easier. Prays before he panics. Budgets before he wants to. Apologizes the same day.

None of it is dramatic. All of it is what running your own life actually looks like on a Tuesday.

Save this and start with the one you're worst at.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #selfcontrol #scripture #brotherhood
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
